emails.subject: Greenway 2.4 is live — what changed
emails.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Version 2.4 ships faster reports and a redesigned alerts page. Highlights:

- Reports render about 3x faster on large portfolios
- Alerts now support percentage and dollar thresholds
- Fixed the timezone bug in the daily digest

Full notes are in the changelog.

— The Greenway team

Unsubscribe or manage preferences: https://greenway.example/prefs?u=5560
Greenway Energy Capital, 3100 Dick Pond Road, Suite 200, Myrtle Beach, SC 29588
